C

compareTo(Word) - Method in class Word
Compares by frequency: negative if this invalid input: '<' w, 0 if equal, positive if this > w.

D

distinctWordsCount(String[]) - Static method in class WordList
Counts the number of distinct, non-empty strings in the token array.

G

getFrequency() - Method in class Word
 
getMostFrequent() - Method in class WordList
Returns the most frequent Word using a single linear scan with compareTo().
getWord() - Method in class Word
 
getWordFrequency() - Method in class WordList
 

I

increment() - Method in class Word
Records one additional occurrence of this word.

L

Lab05 - Class in Unnamed Package
Main class for Lab 5.
Lab05() - Constructor for class Lab05
 
Lab05Tests - Class in Unnamed Package
Unit tests for Word and WordList.
Lab05Tests() - Constructor for class Lab05Tests
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Lab05
 
mostFrequentByLetter(WordList, char) - Static method in class WordList
Returns the most frequent Word starting with letter using filter() and max().

S

search(String) - Method in class WordList
Linear search for a word string.
shortWordsCount(String[], int) - Static method in class WordList
Counts distinct strings of length at most threshold.

T

testAllStopWords() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: All stop-words input must produce an empty (not null) list.
testCompareToEqualFrequency() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Two objects with equal frequency must return 0.
testCompareToExactDifference() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: The lab spec says compareTo equals this.frequency - w.frequency exactly.
testCompareToGreater() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Higher-frequency caller must return a positive value.
testCompareToLess() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Lower-frequency caller must return a negative value.
testCompareToSelf() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: The lab demos self-comparison returning 0 (n - n == 0).
testDistinctWordsCountAllSame() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHYYYY: All identical tokens must return 1, not the raw count.
testDistinctWordsCountEmptyArray() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Empty array must return 0 without throwing.
testDistinctWordsCountIgnoresEmptyStrings() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY?: split() can produce empty strings at array boundaries; they must not be counted as distinct words.
testDistinctWordsCountNormal() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Repeated tokens must be collapsed; 5 raw tokens → 3 distinct strings.
testEmptyTokenArray() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Empty token array must produce an empty list without throwing.
testFrequencyCounting() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Each unique non-stop token must accumulate the correct count.
testGetMostFrequent() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: getMostFrequent() must identify the word with the highest count.
testGetMostFrequentAllTied() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: In a tie, getMostFrequent() must still return a valid Word.
testGetMostFrequentEmptyList() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: getMostFrequent() must return null for an empty list, not throw.
testGetWordFrequency() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: getWordFrequency() must return a non-null list of the correct size.
testIncrementMultipleTimes() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Multiple increments must accumulate, not reset or cap.
testIncrementOnce() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: One increment is the most common case; counter must go from 1 to 2.
testMostFrequentByLetterCaseSensitive() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Tokens are lowercased in main, so uppercase 'P' should find nothing in a properly built WordList.
testMostFrequentByLetterNoMatch() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: No matching letter means the filtered stream is empty; orElse(null) must return null rather than throw.
testMostFrequentByLetterNormal() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WhY: "python"(4) beats "prime"(2) among 'p'-words; "castle"(3) is excluded by the filter even though it has higher frequency than "prime".
testMostFrequentByLetterSingleMatch() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: max() on a single-element stream must return that element.
testSearchNotFound() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: search() must return -1 for an absent word.
testSearchReturnsCorrectIndex() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: The returned index must point to the correct Word, not just be >= 0.
testShortWordsCountNegativeThrows() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: A negative threshold has no meaningful definition and must throw IllegalArgumentException.
testShortWordsCountNegativeThrowsMessage() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: assertThrows returns the caught exception so we can inspect its message and confirm the right code path was hit.
testShortWordsCountNormal() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: With threshold 3, "cat"(3) and "ox"(2) qualify; "lion"(4) does not.
testShortWordsCountThresholdCoversAll() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Threshold >= longest word means every word qualifies.
testShortWordsCountThresholdZero() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Threshold 0 means no word can qualify (every string has length >= 1).
testStopWordsCaseInsensitive() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: stopwords.txt has mixed-case entries like "But", so isStopWord() must use equalsIgnoreCase() to catch them after toLowerCase().
testStopWordsFiltered() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Stop words must be silently excluded from wordFrequency.
testTopKExceedsListSize() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: k > list size must cap at list size with no null entries.
testTopKMostFrequent() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Verifies correct descending order and array length.
testTopOneMostFrequent() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: topKMostFrequent(1) and getMostFrequent() must agree.
testToStringAfterIncrement() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: toString() must reflect the current (live) frequency, not a snapshot.
testToStringFormat() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: The lab specifies the exact format invalid input: '<'word, frequency>.
testWordConstructorAndGetters() - Method in class Lab05Tests
WHY: Confirms the constructor stores the word and starts frequency at 1.
topKMostFrequent(int) - Method in class WordList
Returns the top k most frequent Words in descending order without sorting.
toString() - Method in class Word
Returns the word in the format <word, frequency>.

W

Word - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents a word and its frequency count in a text.
Word(String) - Constructor for class Word
Creates a Word with initial frequency 1.
WordList - Class in Unnamed Package
Holds a list of unique Words built from a raw token array, with stop words excluded.
WordList(ArrayList<String>, String[]) - Constructor for class WordList
Builds the WordList from a token array.
